author: y4rr
content: Observation: actual Embedding::new takes 3 args (no trailing bool), EmbeddingBag::new takes 3 args, Unfold/Fold::new return Self not Result, MaxUnpool2d::forward_with_indices takes &[usize] + (usize,usize) not a tensor. All corrected. Final inventory: 518 items, 168 exclusions. 153 tests pass, fixture script exits 0, 2 cascade bugs filed (#902 attention API drift, #903 structural clippy).
